metadata.name: neverbrith
metadata.description:
neverbrith is a The Binding of Isaac: Repentance mod by brick（青春啊砖在he边看月亮）.
This mod adds a growing set of custom items with EID support and Chinese/English text:
[list] [*] Musicbox - a powerful timed active item with a deadly debt. [*] Angelbox and Devilbox - charge-driven room direction items with extra deal-room rewards. [*] Uncut Cord - delays incoming damage and lets skilled play reduce the debt. [*] Shredded Tarot - turns card pickups into Treasure Room item pedestals. [*] Essential Balm, Wuhu, Aphrodisiac, and more experimental items. [/list]
Author: brick（青春啊砖在he边看月亮）
Links: [url=https://www.youtube.com/@Brickzhou]YouTube: Brickzhou[/url] Bilibili: search 青春啊砖在he边看月亮 [url=https://github.com/BrickAZ/neverbrith]GitHub source[/url]
